expectations.text: Correctly identifies ECCN 3A001 (or 3A001.b) for the RF power amplifier
expectations.evidence: Response identifies '3A001.b — Radio-frequency (RF) power amplifiers' as the primary candidate and concludes 'the most likely classification is ECCN 3A001 (if the item meets control parameters)' throughout the analysis.

expectations.text: States no export licence required for Germany (NLR or equivalent)
expectations.evidence: Response states 'a specific BIS export licence would generally NOT be required for export to Germany for a commercial-use 3A001 amplifier' and the conclusion states 'a specific BIS export licence is very unlikely to be required.'

expectations.text: Identifies Germany as Country Group A or B (not D:1)
expectations.evidence: Response states 'Germany is in Country Group A:1 (Wassenaar Arrangement participants) and Country Group B. It is NOT in any of the more restrictive country groups (D:1 through D:5, or E:1/E:2).'

Section 4 states 'Comply with Electronic Export Information (EEI) filing requirements via AES (Automated Export System) / ACE if the shipment value exceeds $2,500 per Schedule B number or if a licence is required.' Also mentioned in recommended next steps.

expectations.text: Applies the Order of Review (USML check first)
expectations.evidence: The response does not explicitly apply the Order of Review or perform a USML check as a first step. It jumps directly into EAR/CCL classification without mentioning USML jurisdiction determination or the Order of Review framework (§ 732.3). Section 5(e) briefly mentions ITAR as a caveat, but this is not the same as performing the Order of Review.
